foveal_focus: Production V1 Readiness. Gemini 2.5 Flash live. Apify hotel search working (voyager/booking-scraper). Chat state lifted to Space page (XarkChat display-only, ChatInput shared). @xark messages persisted server-side. RLS fixed (auth_user_space_ids SECURITY DEFINER). Remaining: fix Apify activity/flight actor IDs, enable Supabase Realtime replication, Firebase setup.

architectural_locks.color: Theme-aware CSS variables (--xark-white, --xark-void, --xark-accent). Six themes: 3 light (hearth default, cloud, sage) + 3 dark (signal, noir, haze). textColor(alpha) from theme.ts is the approved opacity method.
architectural_locks.fonts: Inter (body, 400), Syne (display/fallback, 400), Inter (wordmark, 300). Inter is primary in globals.css.
architectural_locks.layout: Liquid Feed / Zero-Box. Focus outlines globally purged in globals.css.
architectural_locks.engine: heart-sort.ts is SSOT. Source: /Users/ramchitturi/algo/src/engine/heart-sort.ts. Full port complete (DecisionItem, calculateWeightedScore, addReaction, removeReaction, calculateAgreementScore, getRankedSummary).
architectural_locks.infrastructure: Hybrid Stack: Firebase Auth (OTP), Supabase Postgres (decision engine), Firebase Storage (E2EE multimedia), Firebase FCM (push), Gemini 2.5 Flash (intelligence). Supabase Auth is banned.

engine_config.neuro_colors: All CSS variables via theme.ts. Hearth adjusts for light contrast. Signal/Ember use vivid dark-mode values.

state_flows.BOOKING_FLOW: proposed -> ranked -> locked -> claimed -> purchased (default, extended)

xark_behavior.default_mode: silent — never responds unless message contains '@xark'
xark_behavior.passive_display: decision state subtitles, grounding constraints when asked

social_reasoning.names_for_advocacy: nina and raj aren't feeling italian — want to explore other options?
social_reasoning.counts_for_opposition: 3 people voted not for me (never name opponents)
social_reasoning.test: would the named person feel INCLUDED or EXPOSED?

xark_intelligence.supabase_client: src/lib/supabase.ts — DB-only, no auth. Env: NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL, NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY. Placeholder fallback for local dev.
xark_intelligence.firebase_client: src/lib/firebase.ts — Phone OTP (auth) + E2EE multimedia (storage). No Firestore. Safe-init: exports null when API key is missing.
xark_intelligence.grounding_engine: src/lib/ai-grounding.ts — State map approach (replaces forbidden categories). buildGroundingContext() fetches all items grouped by state. generateGroundingPrompt() produces full state map with reaction counts. checkSuggestionConflicts() is pre-call guard before Gemini. getGreeting(context, spaceTitle?) deterministic (3 logic paths). GroundingContext includes topIgnitedTitle, recentlyLocked {title, ownerName}.
xark_intelligence.reaction_weights_in_grounding: -3 (Not for me), +1 (Works for me), +5 (Love it). Embedded in all grounding prompts.

grounding_tables.decision_items: id, title, category, description, ownership, space_id, is_locked, agreement_score, weighted_score, locked_at
grounding_tables.messages: id, space_id, role, content, user_id, sender_name, created_at

xark_intelligence.blueprint_view: src/components/os/Blueprint.tsx — Vertical timeline of Green-Lock settled decisions + Settlement Ledger. Fetches locked items from Supabase Postgres ordered by locked_at. 1px timeline line at opacity 0.1. ConsensusMark ignited state. Finality wash via currentColor at opacity 0.05. Framer Motion staggered entrance. Settlement strip at bottom: per-user totals, debt deltas, venmo:// and upi:// deep links as floating cyan text.
xark_intelligence.claims_engine: src/lib/claims.ts — claimItem(itemId, userId, proofValue?) manual Green-Lock. Flow-aware terminal states. Optimistic concurrency. Proof: receipt text or verbal fallback.
xark_intelligence.settlement_ledger: src/lib/ledger.ts — fetchSettlement(spaceId) sums locked item prices per owner. parsePrice() handles $450/nt, $95/person, Free. DebtDelta calculates who owes whom. generateVenmoLink() and generateUPILink() produce payment deep links.
xark_intelligence.space_creation: src/lib/spaces.ts — createSpace(dream, ownerId) optimistic creation engine. getOptimisticSpaceId(dream) for instant navigation. Seed item: 'sunset at [destination]' or 'explore [dream]'.
xark_intelligence.handshake_protocol: src/lib/handshake.ts — subscribeToConsensus() monitors agreement_score > 0.80. confirmHandshake() executes Green-Lock. unsubscribeFromConsensus() cleanup.
xark_intelligence.handshake_hook: src/hooks/useHandshake.ts — Returns { proposal, whisper, confirm, dismiss, isCommitting, goldBurst }. Subscribes on mount.
xark_intelligence.chat_handshake_integration: XarkChat uses useHandshake(spaceId). Whisper injected into stream. confirm (colors.gold) and wait (colors.white) as floating text.label. Gold burst on success.
xark_intelligence.galaxy_view: src/app/galaxy/page.tsx — Awareness Stream home. No hero text. Awareness feed from src/lib/awareness.ts: priority-sorted cross-space events. awarenessOpacity(priority) for visual weight. Amber swell on recent activity. Mesh Pulse. Empty: 'who are you planning with?'. Input at 56px from bottom (text.body), living ambient line below text, top ambient line as content boundary. Solid void bg. Manifestation Loop. UserMenu visible here only.
xark_intelligence.awareness_stream: src/lib/awareness.ts — fetchAwareness(userId) aggregates events from all spaces. AwarenessKind types with priority weights. Time decay via exponential function. sortAwareness() by scored priority. awarenessOpacity() maps priority to 0.9/0.7/0.5/0.35/0.25. Demo fallback: getDemoAwareness().
xark_intelligence.space_data: src/lib/space-data.ts — SpaceListItem type (id, title, atmosphere, members, decisionSummary, lastMessage, lastActivityAt). fetchSpaceList() enriches with members + decision summary + last message. recencyLabel(), recencyOpacity(), decisionStateLabel(). DEMO_SPACES fallback.
xark_intelligence.space_view: src/app/space/[id]/page.tsx — discuss/decide/itinerary/memories toggle + share action as floating text.label. Active: colors.cyan at 0.9, inactive: colors.white at 0.4. Share: navigator.share or clipboard copy. Owns chat state (messages, input, isThinking, sendMessage) — persists across view switches. ChatInput always visible. XarkChat is display-only (receives messages as props). No UserMenu.
xark_intelligence.seed_data: src/lib/seed.ts — san diego (4 items, 10 msgs), ananya sanctuary (5 msgs), tokyo (2 items), summer (empty). Run: npx tsx src/lib/seed.ts.
xark_intelligence.control_caret: src/components/os/ControlCaret.tsx — colors.cyan dot (10px) at 32px from bottom, 4.5s breath. GLOBAL via GlobalCaret.tsx. Context-aware tap: inside space -> Galaxy, on Galaxy -> toggle slide-up. Slide-up: Avatar (28px) + text.listTitle name + text.subtitle members/decision state + text.recency timestamps. recencyOpacity() drives title opacity. Presence Ember (4px colors.cyan on avatar). 'invite a person' seed. fetchSpaceList() from space-data.ts, DEMO_SPACES fallback.
xark_intelligence.sanctuary_bridge: XarkChat.tsx — SANCTUARY_MAP maps sender names to space IDs. Slide-up sheet: colors.void bg, 80vh max. Foveal opacity. #000 overlay at 0.8. No blur.
xark_intelligence.chat_interface: src/components/os/XarkChat.tsx — Display-only. Receives messages and isThinking as props from Space page. Atmospheric, no bubbles/boxes. All sizes from theme.ts text tokens (text.body for messages, text.label for roles, text.timestamp inline). fovealOpacity from theme.ts. WhatsApp-dense grouping. Greeting via getGreeting(). No input, no send, no fetch — all state owned by Space page.
xark_intelligence.chat_input: src/components/os/ChatInput.tsx — Two-zone layout. Textarea+mic at 56px from bottom: auto-expanding textarea (text.body, max 6 lines), mic SVG icon (14px), top ambient line, living ambient line below text (grows with content, breathes). Attach (paperclip SVG 16px) at left 25% at caretBottom. Camera (camera SVG 16px) at left 75% at caretBottom. Void fill 56px. Controlled by Space page props.
xark_intelligence.messages_layer: src/lib/messages.ts — fetchMessages, saveMessage, subscribeToMessages, unsubscribeFromMessages. Realtime sync. Graceful fallback.
xark_intelligence.auth_hook: src/hooks/useAuth.ts — Firebase onAuthStateChanged with URL name fallback. Firebase-only. No Supabase Auth.
xark_intelligence.chat_api_endpoint: /api/xark — check for '@xark' prefix before calling Gemini. Silent mode if absent. Fetches space title for location context. Persists @xark response messages server-side via supabaseAdmin (returns messageId). Client deduplicates via Realtime.
xark_intelligence.intelligence_orchestrator: src/lib/intelligence/orchestrator.ts — Gemini 2.5 Flash + Apify tool routing. Stateless. OrchestratorInput (includes spaceTitle) → OrchestratorResult. Strips markdown code fences from Gemini JSON responses.
xark_intelligence.tool_registry: src/lib/intelligence/tool-registry.ts — hotel, flight, activity, restaurant, general. registerTool/getTool/listTools.
xark_intelligence.apify_client: src/lib/intelligence/apify-client.ts — runActor(actorId, input) → ApifyResult[]. Safe: empty when unconfigured.
xark_intelligence.notifications_service: src/lib/notifications.ts — Firebase Admin SDK, sendPush(tokens, title, body, data?). Lazy init. /api/notify route.
xark_intelligence.media_service: src/lib/media.ts — uploadMedia(file, spaceId, userId, caption?) + fetchMedia(spaceId). Firebase Storage + Supabase metadata.
xark_intelligence.state_flows: src/lib/state-flows.ts — FLOW_TERMINAL_STATES + resolveTerminalState(state, flow?) + isTerminalState(state). Shared module.
xark_intelligence.voice_input: src/hooks/useVoiceInput.ts — on-device SpeechRecognition. Tap = dictation. Long-press = @xark prefix.
xark_intelligence.supabase_admin: src/lib/supabase-admin.ts — Service-role client for /api/xark and /api/notify. Bypasses RLS.

theme_system.tokens: src/lib/theme.ts — colors, opacity, timing, text, layout, foveal, neuro, reactions objects
theme_system.helpers: textColor(alpha), accentColor(alpha), amberWash(score), goldBloom(score), fovealOpacity(index, total, role)

video_backgrounds.component: src/components/os/VideoBackground.tsx — HTML5 video with poster fallback, device tier + battery checks
video_backgrounds.fallback: static WebP poster when video cannot play or device is low-end

type_scale.tokens: hero (1.5rem), spaceTitle (clamp), listTitle (1rem), body (0.75rem), subtitle (0.65rem), label (0.6rem), recency (0.5rem), timestamp (0.45rem), input (clamp), hint (0.6rem)

type_system.state_type: open string (not enum) for custom flows
type_system.concurrency: optimistic versioning, VersionConflictError on stale writes
